steps.t: Slaughter the Free Peoples in and around Tol Ascarnen to earn the favour of your masters. Quartermaster Apsduf told you to prepare for battle against …
If Apsduf is slain or Tol Ascarnen was taken by the enemy, go to War-Tyrant Akúlhun at Gramsfoot. You have successfully slaughtered the Free Peoples a…
